mapper.select:
SELECT N.notice_id , N.`group` , N.target_id , C.company_id , H.hospital_id , (CASE N.`group` WHEN 'CM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) WHEN 'HM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', H.hospital_name)
WHEN 'US' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) ELSE '' END) AS target_name , N.title , N.contents , N.top_list , N.attach_filename , N.attach_filename AS org_attach_filename , N.writed_at , N.writed_user_id , sf_user_name(writed_user_id) AS writed_user_name FROM notice N LEFT JOIN company C ON C.company_id = N.target_id
LEFT JOIN hospital H ON N.target_id = H.hospital_id WHERE N.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY N.top_list DESC, N.writed_at DESC

SELECT N.notice_id , N.`group` , N.target_id , C.company_id , H.hospital_id , (CASE N.`group` WHEN 'CM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) WHEN 'HM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', H.hospital_name) WHEN 'US' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) ELSE '' END) AS target_name , N.title , N.contents , N.top_list , N.writed_at , N.writed_user_id , sf_user_name(writed_user_id) AS writed_user_name FROM notice N LEFT JOIN company C ON C.company_id = N.target_id LEFT JOIN hospital H ON N.target_id = H.hospital_id WHERE N.deleted_at IS NULL AND N.`group` = 'US' AND N.target_id IN (#{companyId}, 0) ORDER BY N.top_list DESC, N.writed_at DESC

SELECT N.notice_id , N.`group` , N.target_id , C.company_id , H.hospital_id , (CASE N.`group` WHEN 'CM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) WHEN 'HM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', H.hospital_name) WHEN 'US' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) ELSE '' END) AS target_name , N.title , N.contents , N.top_list , N.attach_filename , N.attach_filename AS org_attach_filename , N.writed_at , N.writed_user_id , sf_user_name(writed_user_id) AS writed_user_name FROM notice N LEFT JOIN company C ON C.company_id = N.target_id LEFT JOIN hospital H ON N.target_id = H.hospital_id WHERE N.deleted_at IS NULL AND N.`group` = 'HM' AND N.target_id IN ((SELECT h.hospital_id FROM hospital h JOIN center HC ON h.hospital_id = HC.hospital_id JOIN center_manager cm ON HC.center_id = cm.center_id WHERE user_id = #{userId}), 0) ORDER BY N.top_list DESC, N.writed_at DESC

SELECT N.notice_id , N.`group` , N.target_id , C.company_id , H.hospital_id , (CASE N.`group` WHEN 'CM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) WHEN 'HM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', H.hospital_name) WHEN 'US' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) ELSE '' END) AS target_name , N.title , N.contents , N.top_list , N.attach_filename , N.attach_filename AS org_attach_filename , N.writed_at , N.writed_user_id , sf_user_name(writed_user_id) AS writed_user_name FROM notice N LEFT JOIN company C ON C.company_id = N.target_id LEFT JOIN hospital H ON N.target_id = H.hospital_id WHERE N.deleted_at IS NULL AND N.`group` = 'CM' AND N.target_id IN ((SELECT company_id FROM company_manager WHERE user_id = #{userId}), 0) ORDER BY N.top_list DESC, N.writed_at DESC

SELECT N.notice_id , N.`group` , N.target_id , C.company_id , H.hospital_id , (CASE N.`group` WHEN 'CM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) WHEN 'HM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', H.hospital_name) WHEN 'US' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) ELSE '' END) AS target_name , N.title , N.contents , N.top_list , N.attach_filename , N.attach_filename AS org_attach_filename , N.writed_at , N.writed_user_id , sf_user_name(writed_user_id) AS writed_user_name FROM notice N LEFT JOIN company C ON C.company_id = N.target_id LEFT JOIN hospital H ON N.target_id = H.hospital_id WHERE N.notice_id = #{noticeId}

SELECT N.notice_id , N.`group` , N.target_id , C.company_id , H.hospital_id , (CASE N.`group` WHEN 'CM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) WHEN 'HM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', H.hospital_name) WHEN 'US' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) ELSE '' END) AS target_name , N.title , N.contents , N.top_list , N.writed_at , N.writed_user_id , sf_user_name(writed_user_id) AS writed_user_name FROM notice N LEFT JOIN company C ON C.company_id = N.target_id LEFT JOIN hospital H ON N.target_id = H.hospital_id WHERE N.deleted_at IS NULL AND N.`group` = 'US' AND N.target_id IN (#{companyId}, 0) AND N.notice_id > #{noticeId} ORDER BY N.writed_at LIMIT 0, 1

SELECT N.notice_id , N.`group` , N.target_id , C.company_id , H.hospital_id , (CASE N.`group` WHEN 'CM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) WHEN 'HM' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', H.hospital_name) WHEN 'US' THEN IF(N.target_id = 0, '전체', C.company_name) ELSE '' END) AS target_name , N.title , N.contents , N.top_list , N.writed_at , N.writed_user_id , sf_user_name(writed_user_id) AS writed_user_name FROM notice N LEFT JOIN company C ON C.company_id = N.target_id LEFT JOIN hospital H ON N.target_id = H.hospital_id WHERE N.deleted_at IS NULL AND N.`group` = 'US' AND N.target_id IN (#{companyId}, 0) AND N.notice_id < #{noticeId} ORDER BY N.writed_at DESC LIMIT 0, 1
